history.created_by: LABEL org.opencontainers.image.authors=Consul Team <consul@hashicorp.com> org.opencontainers.image.url=https://www.consul.io/ org.opencontainers.image.documentation=https://developer.hashicorp.com/docs org.opencontainers.image.source=https://github.com/hashicorp/consul org.opencontainers.image.version=1.22.5 org.opencontainers.image.vendor=HashiCorp org.opencontainers.image.title=consul org.opencontainers.image.description=Consul is a datacenter runtime that provides service discovery, configuration, and orchestration. org.opencontainers.image.licenses=BSL-1.1 name=Consul maintainer=Consul Team <consul@hashicorp.com> vendor=HashiCorp release=3a6dbfc46661d857e84e98da67414a0421e6c3bc revision=3a6dbfc46661d857e84e98da67414a0421e6c3bc summary=Consul is a datacenter runtime that provides service discovery, configuration, and orchestration. description=Consul is a datacenter runtime that provides service discovery, configuration, and orchestration. version=1.22.5

RUN |5 PRODUCT_VERSION=1.22.5 BIN_NAME=consul PRODUCT_REVISION=3a6dbfc46661d857e84e98da67414a0421e6c3bc TARGETOS=linux TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/sh -c apk add -v --no-cache --upgrade 		dumb-init 		libc6-compat 		iptables 		tzdata 		curl 		ca-certificates 		gnupg 		iputils 		libcap 		openssl 		su-exec 		jq # buildkit

RUN |5 PRODUCT_VERSION=1.22.5 BIN_NAME=consul PRODUCT_REVISION=3a6dbfc46661d857e84e98da67414a0421e6c3bc TARGETOS=linux TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/sh -c addgroup $BIN_NAME &&     adduser -S -G $BIN_NAME $BIN_NAME # buildkit

RUN |5 PRODUCT_VERSION=1.22.5 BIN_NAME=consul PRODUCT_REVISION=3a6dbfc46661d857e84e98da67414a0421e6c3bc TARGETOS=linux TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/sh -c mkdir -p /consul/data &&     mkdir -p /consul/config &&     chown -R consul:consul /consul # buildkit

RUN |5 PRODUCT_VERSION=1.22.5 BIN_NAME=consul PRODUCT_REVISION=3a6dbfc46661d857e84e98da67414a0421e6c3bc TARGETOS=linux TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/sh -c test -e /etc/nsswitch.conf || echo 'hosts: files dns' > /etc/nsswitch.conf # buildkit

RUN |5 PRODUCT_VERSION=1.22.5 BIN_NAME=consul PRODUCT_REVISION=3a6dbfc46661d857e84e98da67414a0421e6c3bc TARGETOS=linux TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/sh -c chmod +x /usr/local/bin/docker-entrypoint.sh # buildkit
mount / from exec apk add --no-cache zlib
mount / from exec apk upgrade --no-cache zlib

Labels.description: Consul is a datacenter runtime that provides service discovery, configuration, and orchestration.

Vulnerabilities.Title: url.Parse insufficiently validated the host/authority component and ac ...
Vulnerabilities.Description: url.Parse insufficiently validated the host/authority component and accepted some invalid URLs.

Vulnerabilities.Title: On Unix platforms, when listing the contents of a directory using File ...
Vulnerabilities.Description: On Unix platforms, when listing the contents of a directory using File.ReadDir or File.Readdir the returned FileInfo could reference a file outside of the Root in which the File was opened. The impact of this escape is limited to reading metadata provided by lstat from arbitrary locations on the filesystem without permitting reading or writing files outside the root.

Vulnerabilities.Title: Actions which insert URLs into the content attribute of HTML meta tags ...
Vulnerabilities.Description: Actions which insert URLs into the content attribute of HTML meta tags are not escaped. This can allow XSS if the meta tag also has an http-equiv attribute with the value "refresh". A new GODEBUG setting has been added, htmlmetacontenturlescape, which can be used to disable escaping URLs in actions in the meta content attribute which follow "url=" by setting htmlmetacontenturlescape=0.
